name: Private Par
about: Private Par is an indoor golf simulator venue located in Milan, Michigan, offering a community-centered atmosphere for golfers to practice, compete, and socialize. The facility features state-of-the-art simulators with high-quality technology for a realistic golf experience, along with a comfortable lounge area featuring TVs and free Wi-Fi. Membership options are available with flexible plans ranging from 5 to 10 included hours per month, and hourly rates as low as $15, with additional hours purchased at varying rates depending on the membership tier.
why_golfers_like_it: Flexible membership options with hourly rates as low as $15
24/7 key fob access for ultimate convenience
Community-centered atmosphere with a comfortable lounge area
High-quality simulators for a realistic golf experience

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service provided
No mention of alcohol service provided

faq.answer: You will need to bring your own clubs to use the simulators.

faq.answer: BYOB is not explicitly mentioned, but no food or drink service is indicated, so it may be allowed.

faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes is not specified.
